commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And Daniel continued even unto the first year of king Cyrus. Cyrus; and also to the third, (Chap. x) and of course during the whole of the captivity. (Worthington) He was maintained in power by the conqueror of Babylon, chap. He first displayed his sagacity in the cause of Susanna, (Chap. ; Calmet) whose history was placed at the head of the book, in Theodotion, (St. Jerome in Isaias iii. ) as in its natural order.

commentaries.author: Jerome
commentaries.content: In the later discussion we shall explain how it was that Daniel who is here described as having continued till the first year of king Cyrus afterwards held office in the third year of that same Cyrus and is even recorded to have lived in the first year of Darius.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
